name: basic_extraction
description: Core entities and relationships are extracted and retrievable

exchanges.user_message: I am Adam, I run a company called BrightPath. We have 12 employees and our main product is an AI scheduling tool for dentists.
exchanges.assistant_response: BrightPath — AI scheduling for dentists with a team of 12. That is a focused vertical. What is your current revenue?

exchanges.user_message: Revenue is 85k MRR. Sarah is my CTO, she previously worked at Stripe. We are targeting mid-size dental practices with 3-10 dentists.
exchanges.assistant_response: 85k MRR with 12 people is healthy. Sarah from Stripe adds serious technical credibility. The 3-10 dentist segment is specific enough to own.

assertions.description: Sarah CTO from Stripe is captured
Product (AI scheduling for dentists) is stored
